arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his side were "outstanding" against Tottenham as they moved to within four points of Premier League leaders Liverpool with victory in the north London derby.
Match of the Day pundits Micah Richards and Alan Shearer discuss how Arsenal beat a "passive" Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host old foes Aston Villa in hopes to close gap at the top of the table
arts.sum: Ex-Arsenal boss Unai Emery's Aston Villa side head to the Emirates Stadium. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Man City huge 115 charges final verdict hint dropped as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham watch on
arts.sum: Stefan Borson believes that Manchester City's latest spending spree is a'sign of confidence' following their dispute with the Premier League. Speaking to the British newspaper, Borson suggested that Manchester City's spending could be a'sign of confidence' after locking horns with the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Why William Saliba isn't playing for Arsenal vs Aston Villa as Mikel Arteta dealt injury worry
arts.sum: William Saliba is absent from the Arsenal matchday squad to face Aston Villa today due to hamstring tightness, football.london understands. Saka, meanwhile, will be away from the club's training ground as Arteta confirmed he would be going on holiday.

arts.ttl: Saliba injury adds to Arsenal woes but Premier League title closer than ever
arts.sum: However, should Arsenal beat Aston Villa at home on Saturday night, the gap would be back to four points - albeit with Liverpool holding a game in hand on their rivals. Riccardo Calafiori was another new signing in the summer and with his absence from the squad for the Villa clash he has now missed eight matches due to injury this season.

arts.ttl: Brentford star asked directly about Arsenal transfer rumour – Hasn’t seen it, questions suggestion
arts.sum: Brentford star Mikkel Damsgaard has insisted he’s not seen anything about potential interest from Arsenal. Tipsbladet cover comments from the Brentford man today, from an interview made with TV station Viaplay. The 24-year-old appears to have finally found his feet in England after struggling considerably following a €15m move in 2022. arts.ttl: Why Arsenal look like a Mourinho team - but must change to win like one
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal have been likened to a Jose Mourinho team this season - but how accurate are those comparisons and will it bring success?
